---
title: "Clean Non-Personnel"
format: html
---

# Setup

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
library(arrow)

options(scipen = 12, digits = 12)

path_data <- Sys.getenv("PATH_DATA")
year_fiscal <- Sys.getenv("YEAR_FISCAL")

path_r209 <- glue("{path_data}/raw/r209_GD0_GA0_{year_fiscal}.xlsx")
path_r051a_ga0 <-
  glue("{path_data}/raw/r051a_expense_71_GA0_{year_fiscal}.xlsx")
path_r051a_gd0 <-
  glue("{path_data}/raw/r051a_expense_71_GD0_{year_fiscal}.xlsx")
```

# Import

## Cost center categorization

```{r}
costcenters <-
  read_excel(glue("{path_data}/manual/costcenters_categorization.xlsx")) |>
  select(costcenter_id, is_school)
```

```{r}
# pos_cat_prev <-
#   read_excel(
#     glue("{path_working}/Previous Categorization - PO.xlsx"),
#     col_types = "text"
#   ) |>
#   clean_names() |>
#   mutate(across(po_number, str_squish)) |>
#   distinct(po_number, po_categorization_previous)
#
# grants <-
#   read_excel(
#     glue("{path_working}/Grants good.xlsx"),
#     col_types = c(rep("text", 3), "logical")
#   )
```

```{r}
# programs <- read_excel("data/programs.xlsx")
#
# pos <- read_excel("data/pos.xlsx")
```

```{r}
r209 <-
  read_excel(path_r209, range = "A17:AG3974", col_types = "text") |>
  clean_names() |>
  rename(project_id = project)

r051a_ga0 <-
  read_excel(
    path_r051a_ga0,
    range = "A13:AU46857",
    col_types = c(rep("text", 36), rep("numeric", 3), rep("text", 8))
  ) |>
  clean_names()

r051a_gd0 <-
  read_excel(
    path_r051a_gd0,
    range = "A13:AU60710",
    col_types = c(rep("text", 36), rep("numeric", 3), rep("text", 8))
  ) |>
  clean_names()
```

# Tidy

```{r}
nonpersonnel <-
  bind_rows(r051a_ga0, r051a_gd0) |>
  rename(
    agency_id = agency,
    program_id = program, program_name = program_desc,
    costcenter_id = cost_center, costcenter_name = cost_center_desc,
    account_id = account, account_name = account_desc,
    project_id = project, project_name = project_desc,
    award_id = award, award_name = award_desc
  ) |>
  filter(agency_id == "GA0" | ((project_id %in% r209$project_id))) |>
  left_join(costcenters, by = join_by(costcenter_id)) |>
  mutate(
    costcenter_id = if_else(
      is_school, "SCHOOL", costcenter_id, missing = costcenter_id
    ),
    costcenter_name = if_else(
      is_school, "SCHOOL", costcenter_name, missing = costcenter_name
    ),
  )

nonpersonnel_costcenter_account <-
  nonpersonnel |>
  summarize(
    net_accounted = sum(net_accounted),
    .by = c(costcenter_id, account_id)
  ) |>
  filter(net_accounted != 0.00)

nonpersonnel <-
  nonpersonnel |>
  semi_join(
    nonpersonnel_costcenter_account,
    by = join_by(costcenter_id, account_id)
  )

nonpersonnel |>
  pull(net_accounted) |>
  sum()
```

```{r}
services_excluded <- c(
  "7131002",
  "7131003",
  "7131006",
  "7131007",
  "7131012",
  "7131014",
  "7131015",
  "7131016",
  "7131017",
  "7131019",
  "7131020",
  "7131024",
  "7131025",
  "7131033",
  "7131045",
  "7132004"
)
```

```{r}
nonpersonnel_clean <-
  nonpersonnel |>
  mutate(po_number = str_extract(
    transaction_id, regex("PO[:digit:]{6}", ignore_case = FALSE)
  )) |>
  mutate(is_po = !is.na(po_number)) |>
  mutate(
    is_service = when_all(
      str_detect(account_parent_1, "^713[12]"),
      !(account_id %in% services_excluded)
    )
  ) |>
  mutate(is_capital = case_when(
    appropriation_fund == "3030" ~ TRUE,
    .default = FALSE
  ))
```

# Transform

```{r}
# r051a_aug <-
#   r051a_clean |>
# left_join(costcenters, by = join_by(costcenter)) |>
# left_join(programs, by = join_by(program)) |>
# left_join(pos, by = join_by(po_number)) |>
# left_join(pos_cat_prev, by = join_by(po_number)) |>
# mutate(is_grant = case_when(
#   award == "1000074" & project == "400308" ~ TRUE,
#   award != "1000074" & (award %in% grants$award_current) ~ TRUE,
#   award != "1000074" & (award %in% grants$award_carryover) ~ TRUE,
#   .default = FALSE
# ))
```


```{r}
nonpersonnel_clean |>
  write_parquet(glue("{path_data}/working/nonpersonnel_clean.parquet"))
nonpersonnel_clean |>
  write_csv(glue("{path_data}/working/nonpersonnel_clean.csv"), na = "")
```

Write out PO's for review

```{r}
```

# Diagnostics

```{r}
nonpersonnel_clean
```

```{r}
Sys.time()
```
